_doc.purpose: Localization companion for item_gamecd_DS3.json. Holds en-us entries for the knowledge_game_DS3_* flavor-text cluster.
_doc.naming_convention: Per user decision 2026-07-22: character/boss/location names are parody-renamed in the same light spirit as the title itself (Dark Souls 3 -> Deep Soul 3), not translated to their real official localizations. See name_consistency.md for the full substitution table. The four knowledge_game_DS3_characters_firekeeper_N quotes were already written in English directly in the zh-cn source (official VO lines quoted as-is) - copied verbatim, not retranslated.
_doc.ds3_reference_note: Critical: 'ds3_reference' itself needed an en-us entry too, distinct from item_gamecd_DS3 (which hardcodes 'Deep Soul 3' directly rather than using the token). Every knowledge_game_DS3_* entry below embeds %%ds3_reference%%, so without this entry the token would render literally as 'ds3_reference' in English builds instead of resolving.

en-us.knowledge_game_DS3_world_undead_curse: The Curse of the Undead in %%ds3_reference%%
en-us.knowledge_game_DS3_world_painted_world: The Painted World of Arianne in %%ds3_reference%%
en-us.knowledge_game_DS3_mechanics_invade: The invasion and cooperation system in %%ds3_reference%%
en-us.knowledge_game_DS3_characters_firekeeper: Ashen one, hearest thou my voice, still?
I tend to the flame, and tend to thee.
Are you in search of your lord's remain?
One day, tiny sprites will dance around a bonfire.
en-us.knowledge_game_DS3_bosses_twin_princes: The Twin Princes of Lothaire in %%ds3_reference%%
